name: Padded Armor
summary: Quilted layers of cloth and batting — cheap, warm, and loud.

name: Leather Armor
summary: Stiffened leather, the adventurer's default second skin.

name: Studded Leather Armor
summary: Leather reinforced with rivets; light armor at its best.

name: Hide Armor
summary: Thick furs and pelts, favored far from tanneries.

name: Chain Shirt
summary: A shirt of interlocked rings worn between layers of cloth.

name: Scale Mail
summary: Overlapping metal scales on a leather coat, hissing as you move.

name: Breastplate
summary: A fitted metal chest piece that leaves the limbs free.

name: Half Plate Armor
summary: Shaped plates over the vital half of you.

name: Ring Mail
summary: Leather with heavy rings sewn in — armor for the frugal.

name: Chain Mail
summary: Head-to-toe interlocked rings over padding.

name: Splint Armor
summary: Vertical metal strips riveted to a sturdy backing.

name: Plate Armor
summary: The full shell: shaped, interlocking plates. The knight's answer.

name: Shield
summary: A broad board of wood and steel; +2 AC in the hand.

name: Club
summary: A stout length of wood.

name: Dagger
summary: Quick, concealable, and everywhere.

name: Greatclub
summary: A tree limb with opinions.

name: Handaxe
summary: Chops wood; also throws well.

name: Javelin
summary: A light spear made to fly.

name: Light Hammer
summary: A smith's tool with reach ambitions.

name: Mace
summary: A flanged head on a haft; armor's old enemy.

name: Quarterstaff
summary: Six feet of hardwood, humble and reliable.

name: Sickle
summary: A harvester's crescent blade.

name: Spear
summary: The oldest weapon that still works.

name: Dart
summary: A weighted throwing spike.

name: Light Crossbow
summary: Point, squeeze, reload.

name: Shortbow
summary: A hunter's bow, quick to draw.

name: Sling
summary: A strap, a stone, and practice.

name: Battleaxe
summary: A war axe balanced for one hand or two.

name: Flail
summary: A spiked head on a chain — ignores manners and shields.

name: Glaive
summary: A blade on a long haft.

name: Greataxe
summary: The barbarian's favorite argument.

name: Greatsword
summary: Six feet of steel, swung wide.

name: Halberd
summary: Axe, hook and spike on a pole.

name: Lance
summary: A cavalry spear; devastating at a gallop.

name: Longsword
summary: The knightly standard.

name: Maul
summary: A great hammer for un-making things.

name: Morningstar
summary: A spiked ball on a haft.

name: Pike
summary: Eighteen feet of keep-away.

name: Rapier
summary: A dueling blade for the quick of wrist.

name: Scimitar
summary: A curved slashing blade, fast as a whisper.

name: Shortsword
summary: A stabbing blade for close, fast work.

name: Trident
summary: A three-pronged fishing spear gone to war.

name: War Pick
summary: A miner's pick, militarized.

name: Warhammer
summary: A hammer forged for the battlefield.

name: Whip
summary: Reach and sting, at the price of heft.

name: Blowgun
summary: A whisper that carries a needle.

name: Hand Crossbow
summary: A crossbow for one hand.

name: Heavy Crossbow
summary: Slow to load, brutal to receive.

name: Longbow
summary: The archer's reach across a battlefield.

name: Torch
summary: An hour of light, held in the fist.

name: Rope (50 ft)
summary: Hemp rope: the most underrated item in the game.

name: Healer's Kit
summary: Bandages and salves; stabilizes the dying, ten uses.

name: Thieves' Tools
summary: Picks, files and shims for locks and traps.

name: Arrows (20)
summary: A quiver's worth of ammunition.

name: Crossbow Bolts (20)
summary: A case of bolts.
